hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "schemas\.py|signals\.py|trend_filter\.py"; then if echo "$CLAUDE_OLD_STRING $CLAUDE_NEW_STRING" | grep -qiE "min_count|min_score|min_net|tp_levels|sl_pct|exit_split|leverage|risk_per_trade|CONFLUENCE_THRESHOLDS|TF_PARAMS"; then echo "⚠️ 트레이딩 파라미터 변경 감지. /trade-review 로 전문가 토론을 먼저 실행하세요."; exit 1; fi; fi'
